about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm an 18-year-old student developer at Sup de Vinci Bordeaux, driven by curiosity and a deep love for building things that live on screens.
about.p2: Currently in my first year of a Bachelor's in Computer Science, I'm sharpening my skills in web development, software engineering, and exploring the worlds of app development and AI.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm probably learning something new, tinkering with a side project, or diving into the latest tech.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind or just want to say hi?
